parsed.recommendation_text: For office work, the Sony WH-CH710N offers a balanced approach with good noise cancellation and an impressive 50-hour battery life. Its mid-range price point makes it accessible while still delivering quality sound and comfort. The bass-heavy tuning might not suit all tastes but provides robust audio performance for daily use.
parsed.selection_rationale: Balances cost, brand familiarity, and office suitability.
